offerings.title: Personalized Health Plans (The Man Plan)
offerings.description: AI-powered nutrition and fitness plans customized for men 40+. Adapts to your body, your goals, your life. Delivered via SMS.

offerings.title: Health Tracking & Accountability
offerings.description: SMS-based daily tracking for weight, nutrition, fitness, energy. Your AI coach checks in, adjusts, keeps you honest.

offerings.title: Mean Clean Lean — The Book
offerings.description: Comprehensive guide to men's health after 40. Nutrition science, fitness programming, mindset work. Available for purchase.

offerings.title: Doctor Consultations
offerings.description: Connect with healthcare professionals who understand the ManVsHealth approach. Integrated into your health journey.

offerings.title: Men's Health After 40 Expertise
offerings.description: Deep domain knowledge in nutrition, fitness, and health optimization for men in their 40s, 50s, and beyond.

offerings.title: Your Sovereign Health Data
offerings.description: All your health tracking data, exportable in standard JSON. Your data, your sovereignty, always.
